results.name: beta_max_run_norm
results.description: Linear regression slope of chose_left on the difference in normalized max run length (max_run_norm_b - max_run_norm_a).

results.name: beta_rep_motifs
results.description: Linear regression slope of chose_left on the difference in repeating motifs (rep_motifs_b - rep_motifs_a).

results.name: beta_periodicity
results.description: Linear regression slope of chose_left on the difference in periodicity (periodicity_b - periodicity_a).

results.name: high_periodicity_rejection
results.description: Mean probability of choosing left when sequence A is highly periodic (>0.6) but sequence B is not (<0.4).

results.name: imbalance_sensitivity_diff_by_length
results.description: Difference in the slope of chose_left on (imbalance_b - imbalance_a) between long sequences (n >= 7) and short sequences (n <= 5).

results.name: beta_alt_motifs_matched_palts
results.description: Slope of chose_left on (alt_motifs_b - alt_motifs_a) for trials where the absolute difference in p_alts is less than 0.1.

results.name: beta_length_diff
results.description: Slope of chose_left on the difference in sequence lengths (n_a - n_b).

results.name: extreme_max_run_rejection
results.description: Mean probability of choosing left when sequence A has a max_run >= 4 and sequence B has max_run < 3.
